title: Spotlight on George's finest as Best of George returns
description: GEORGE NEWS - For the third consecutive...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - For the third consecutive year, George Herald is proud to present the Best of George Readers' Choice Awards - a celebration of the places and businesses that make our town truly special.

This isn't just another competition. It's your chance to shine a spotlight on those who go the extra mile, whether it's the barista who knows your order by heart, the beauty salon that leaves you glowing, or the handyman who always shows up on time.

From culinary gems and top-class healthcare to lifestyle services and leisure spots, Best of George recognises the everyday excellence that often goes unnoticed.


> Nominations open 1 May at www.bestofgeorge.com and once again it's you, our readers, who will decide who deserves the honour of being named the best.


The process is simple, open to all, and completely free - so no pay-to-play or behind-the-scenes strings. Just honest votes from a community that knows its own.

Whether you're a proud business owner, a loyal customer or simply passionate about celebrating what makes George great, this is your moment. By nominating and voting, you'll not only uplift deserving local heroes, but also stand a chance to win exciting prizes.

Nominations are now open! Click here to nominate your favorite businesses today!


> Voting closes 15 May 2025.


Brought to you by George Herald, Best of George is our way of applauding local excellence - and it only works because of you.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
